name: Stored Data Manipulation
description: Detects potential manipulation of stored data in databases or files for integrity attacks
query:
// Detect mass data manipulation in databases
// Trigger on bulk UPDATE or DELETE operations
events from database
where event_type matches "(?i)(UPDATE|DELETE)"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(WHERE\s+1\s*=\s*1|WITHOUT\s+WHERE|TRUNCATE|DROP\s+TABLE)"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 3
within 120 seconds
